news.title: Welcome to our new Undergraduate Researchers!
news.excerpt: The Salguero Lab welcomes several new undergraduate research assistants joining us for the summer session.
news.content: We are excited to welcome new undergraduate chemistry students who will be working on synthesis and characterization projects. They will be paired with senior graduate student mentors to learn advanced solid-state synthesis techniques.

news.title: Jane Doe wins Outstanding Graduate Student Award
news.excerpt: Ph.D. student Jane Doe has been awarded the UGA Chemistry Department's Outstanding Graduate Research Award.
news.content: Congratulations to Jane Doe on receiving the Outstanding Graduate Student Research Award for her pioneering work on high-yield nanosheet exfoliation. The award recognizes research excellence, publication records, and mentorship within the department.
